info.title: Health One App API
info.description: Backend-first API contract for 건강 one app, a personal health factor logging and AI analysis app.

get.summary: List health events by type and time range

post.summary: Create or confirm a meal record

get.summary: Get beverage, water, caffeine, and sugar summary

post.summary: Register a medication or supplement item
Create a medication or supplement intake log

get.summary: Get intake schedule for a date

post.summary: Check medication and supplement caution information
post.description: Returns wellness caution information, not diagnosis, treatment, or prescription guidance.

post.summary: Analyze cosmetic ingredient text or image
Sync Apple HealthKit or Samsung Health data from a mobile client
post.description: The mobile app reads authorized HealthKit or Samsung Health records and uploads normalized events. The server deduplicates by sourceId and externalRecordId.
Creates a server-side Upstage Solar Pro response for a health-management question. The response is informational and not medical diagnosis.

ServiceUnavailable.description: AI provider unavailable or not configured

safetyNotice.description: This is wellness caution information and not medical diagnosis, treatment, or prescription guidance.
